resources.name: Astral Core
resources.description: Core resource used for SS gear progression and astral forge progression.
resources.notes: Small manual test note. Does not include exact costs or damage values.

resources.name: Xeno Core
resources.description: Core resource used for Xeno pet progression.
resources.notes: Small manual test note. Does not include exact costs or damage values.

resources.name: Resonance Chip
resources.description: Resource used for tech and resonance progression.
resources.notes: Small manual test note. Does not include exact costs or damage values.

chests.name: Core Selector Chest
chests.description: Selector chest for choosing between core resources in the V1 optimizer test.
chests.notes: The manual note mentions the core resources, but not an exact in-game chest name or choice list.

rules.name: Astral Core Near Breakpoint Priority
rules.description: Astral Core can be valuable when it helps reach an SS gear or astral forge breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact breakpoint values are provided.

rules.name: Xeno Core Long-Term Breakpoint Priority
rules.description: Xeno Core is usually more valuable long-term when the player is close to a Xeno awakening breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact awakening breakpoint values are provided.

rules.name: Resonance Chip Lower Without Breakpoint
rules.description: Resonance Chip may be weaker if it does not unlock a major breakpoint.
rules.notes: No exact resonance breakpoint values are provided.

warnings.name: Core Test Generic Placeholder Warning
warnings.description: The manual core test contains generic progression notes only.
warnings.notes: Do not treat this as final Survivor.io balance data.
